_comment: Backtest-specific config — inherits from main settings.json and overrides specific values for backtesting
backtest_notes: This config is loaded by run_backtest.py. It merges with settings.json, so you only need to specify overrides here.
_disabled_setups_note: PIN_BAR had 14.3% WR and -175.6 pips in backtest — worst performing setup

execution._killzone_note: 60% of trades were in DEAD_ZONE with near-breakeven results — enforce KZ to filter noise

news._comment: Disable news filter during backtesting (we don't have historical news data)

risk._comment: Relaxed risk limits for backtesting — we want to see all possible trades
